news.headline: Errors in Hong Kong Tai Po blaze hearing transcript raise transparency concerns
news.summary:
The official transcript of a public hearing into Hong Kong’s deadliest blaze in decades has wrongly recorded several key details, the South China Morning Post has found, prompting an academic to urge that future proceedings be live-streamed to strengthen transparency and public trust.

news.headline: China woman uses an old photo to find brother who was lured away with bread 33 years ago
news.summary:
Using only a childhood photograph, a woman in central China found her younger brother who had been lured away with a piece of bread more than three decades ago.
